productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Casual Grey Casual Shoes
description: Take casual dressing to the next level with this high ankle leather shoe from red tape. The full grain leather lends it a natural colour finish that adds to your look an immense style quotient.UpperFull-grain leather upper for absolute comfort, durability and styleHigh ankle for enhanced style and better support to the lower legLeather overlays for added shoe structure and styleFabric inner lining with a padded collar and tongue for ultimate breathabilityLace-up system for a snug, customised FitMock wrap-around lace at the back foot for enhanced styleMidsoleFabric footbed for sweat-free comfortPU midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleDurable textured rubber outsole with horizontal grooves on the toe and back heel region for absolute grip and traction Shoe careUse a dry clean cloth to remove dustDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
